name: BillionToOne, Inc.
business: BillionToOne develops and sells single-molecule next-generation sequencing (smNGS) based molecular diagnostic tests for prenatal screening and oncology therapy selection and monitoring. Its products include the UNITY prenatal test portfolio and the Northstar oncology test portfolio, marketed to obstetricians, maternal-fetal medicine specialists, and oncologists.
sellsTo: Prenatal testing market (obstetricians, maternal-fetal medicine specialists)

exposures.sentence: BillionToOne is transforming healthcare by redefining molecular diagnostics.

Our smNGS platform leverages proprietary and patent-protected technologies that allow us to detect previously undetectable diseases and support physicians developing and managing treatment plans for patients.
We have built products for this characterization, and we are starting to integrate our diagnostics with this multi-modal clinical history.

catalysts.event: Expanded UNITY Fetal Risk Screen to include up to 14 conditions
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we expanded UNITY Fetal Risk Screen’s testing menu to include up to 14 conditions, further enhancing its clinical impact.

catalysts.event: Launch of expanded RBC Fetal Antigen NIPT and first-and-only Platelet Fetal Antigen NIPT
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced the launch of our expanded Red Blood Cell (RBC) Fetal Antigen NIPT and a first-and-only Platelet Fetal Antigen NIPT.
For example, in January 2026, we launched Northstar PGx, and in February 2026 we launched Northstar Select CH.
For example, in January 2026, we launched Northstar PGx, and in February 2026 we launched Northstar Select CH.

catalysts.event: Commercial availability of tissue-free, pan-cancer MRD test
catalysts.sentence: We are developing a tissue-free, pan-cancer MRD test, which we expect to be commercially available in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Opening of Austin, Texas laboratory facility for commercial samples
catalysts.sentence: We expect to occupy this facility in 2027, and open for processing commercial samples in 2028.
We completed enrollment of the study in early 2025 and expect to complete sample and data collection by the end of 2025. We expect the initial results to be available in 2026.
